ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method used for shipping (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Total tax amount for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending, Failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the order */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the line item (combination of order_id and product_id) */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order this line item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of each unit of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the line item */,
  "line_total" REAL /* Total cost of the line item (unit_price * quantity * (1 - discount)) */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the line item */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the line item */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the line item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the line item was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the line item was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the default address for the customer */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the customer record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the customer record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Current sales price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in stock */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the product record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the product record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the address record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the address record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the address record was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the address record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the category record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the category record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category record was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier's address */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the supplier record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the supplier record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier record was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Sales Agent, Warehouse Staff) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the user record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the user record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
